posts.title: Things to do near Hay-on-Wye
posts.heroAlt: Stream running past a woodland cabin
posts.cardAlt: Stream running past a woodland cabin at Wye Cabins
posts.excerpt: From wild swimming at Glasbury's pebble beaches to climbing Hay Bluff for sweeping mountain views, there's no shortage of adventure on our doorstep.
posts.metaDescription: Things to do near Hay-on-Wye — wild swimming, Hay Bluff walks, bookshops, and family activities. Stories and guides from Wye Cabins.

posts.title: A day in Hay-on-Wye
posts.cardAlt: Mountain view from Bramble cabin at Wye Cabins
posts.excerpt: Known as the town of books, Hay-on-Wye is bursting with independent bookshops and cosy cafes. Browse quirky finds, grab local ice cream, and catch the Thursday market.
posts.metaDescription: A perfect day in Hay-on-Wye: where to eat, which bookshops to visit, and how to make the most of the River Wye and Black Mountains.

posts.title: Where to eat near Wye Cabins
posts.cardAlt: Wood burner inside Bramble cabin at Wye Cabins
posts.excerpt: From The Griffin at Felin Fach for a special occasion to Tomatitos for a lively evening, discover our favourite local restaurants, pubs and cafes.
posts.metaDescription: The best restaurants, pubs, cafes and supper clubs near Hay-on-Wye and the Brecon Beacons — recommended by Wye Cabins.
